mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, subject_id, item_order, presented_at, answered_at, is_answered, is_correct, user_submitted_answer, bookmarked_wrong FROM study_session_item ORDER BY id

SELECT id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, subject_id, item_order, presented_at, answered_at, is_answered, is_correct, user_submitted_answer, bookmarked_wrong FROM study_session_item WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, subject_id, item_order, presented_at, answered_at, is_answered, is_correct, user_submitted_answer, bookmarked_wrong FROM study_session_item WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY item_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_session_item (session_id, item_type, reference_id, subject_id, item_order, presented_at, answered_at, is_answered, is_correct, user_submitted_answer, bookmarked_wrong) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{itemType}, #{referenceId}, #{subjectId}, #{itemOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{answeredAt}, #{isAnswered}, #{isCorrect}, #{userSubmittedAnswer}, #{bookmarkedWrong})
mapper.update: UPDATE study_session_item SET session_id = #{sessionId}, item_type = #{itemType}, reference_id = #{referenceId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, item_order = #{itemOrder}, presented_at = #{presentedAt}, answered_at = #{answeredAt}, is_answered = #{isAnswered}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, user_submitted_answer = #{userSubmittedAnswer}, bookmarked_wrong = #{bookmarkedWrong} WHERE id = #{id}
